steps.title: Apply distance = speed × time to each segment
steps.content: Nicole walks at 2 mph for $w$ hours, so her walking distance is $2w$ miles. She runs at 7 mph for $r$ hours, so her running distance is $7r$ miles.

steps.title: Add distances to get the total
steps.content:
The sum of her walking and running distances equals the total distance traveled:
$$2w + 7r = 13$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
